name: Setup studio & workflow musical
description: Matériel, chaîne UAD, workflow MPC × Logic Pro, micro AT4047/SV, objectifs loudness, compétences vocales.
content:
**Studio upgrade (AT4047/SV):** Clody replaced the SM7B with an Audio-Technica AT4047/SV condenser microphone. The Triton FetHead was removed (no longer needed). Full reconfiguration documented: Apollo gain 40–45dB, +48V phantom power, UAD Console chain (Neve 1073 Unison → 1176 Rev E LN → LA-2A Gray → Pultec EQP-1A → MAAG EQ4) with AT4047/SV-specific settings. Logic chain preserved (Bus 10: R-Vox/Pro-C2/Abbey Road Saturator; Bus 20: CLA parallel; Valhalla sends; Pro-L2 mastering at −10 LUFS). A comprehensive 19-page PDF studio manual was generated via ReportLab covering all hardware, UAD config, MPC integration modes, and troubleshooting. Optimal recording distance: 15–30cm; target levels: peaks −10 to −6 dBFS.

**MPC Live III × Logic Pro workflow:** Validated integration: MPC for groove/beat creation and stems export (WAV 24-bit/48kHz) → Logic for vocals and mix. MTC sync (not MIDI Clock — incompatible with audio recording). MMC enabled for transport control. Three Logic template versions defined: Base / RECORD (lightweight) / MIX (complete). Q-Links assignable in MIDI Control Mode for Logic plugin control (Bank A: faders/sends; Bank B: plugin params; Relative mode to avoid value jumps). Key identified skill gap: automation (volume/reverb/delay) is the primary area separating current capability from professional results.

**Microphone selection process:** Extended research and comparison process involving SM7B → AT4050 → TLM 103 → AT4047/SV. AT4050 was recommended for untreated room (omni mode minimizes reflections); TLM 103 acknowledged as reference quality but risky without acoustic treatment. AT4047/SV ultimately purchased for its transformer-coupled warmth and high sensitivity. Room context: 9m² untreated bedroom, first floor, rural/isolated — modes 80–300Hz and early reflections 1–8kHz are primary acoustic problems.

**Klod Ynlov artist development:** First official track "Remède" (zouk). Press kit generated. SACEM registration and digital distribution (DistroKid/TuneCore) identified as immediate priorities. Initial SoundCloud/Facebook presence deemed insufficient for target audience.

**Logistics skill:** A reusable skill file (`logistics-performance-analyst.skill`) built for Mondial Relay night shift performance analysis — Pareto charts (TRN CFM, ARR CAM, reste à quai, hors délai), navette/hub impact analysis, COPIL QS deliverables. A separate weekly workforce planning skill (`generate_prevision.py`) built for Week 17 forecasting with parameterized inputs (volume, buffer, PROD ratio).

**karaibart.fr:** Personal site project — 3 themes (music, tech, life). Stack: Next.js App Router + Mailchimp (tags: interest_music, interest_tech, interest_life). Includes an agentic AI widget for visitor onboarding and newsletter signup. Backend: Next.js API Routes + VPS (Nginx + PM2) or Vercel.
